mapper.sql: organization_id, tenant_id, enterprise_id, project_dept_id, project_dept_name, service_contact_name, service_contact_phone, service_basis, service_start_date, service_end_date, status, submitted_by_account_id, submitted_by_user_id, submitted_at, verified_by_account_id, verified_by_user_id, verified_at, rejection_reason, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_property_service_organization WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 0 WHEN 'PENDING_VERIFICATION' THEN 1 WHEN 'DRAFT' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, update_time DESC, organization_id DESC
SELECT FROM t_property_service_organization WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_property_service_organization ( tenant_id, enterprise_id, project_dept_id, project_dept_name, service_contact_name, service_contact_phone, service_basis, service_start_date, service_end_date, status, submitted_by_account_id, submitted_by_user_id, submitted_at, verified_by_account_id, verified_by_user_id, verified_at, rejection_reason, version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{enterpriseId}, #{projectDeptId}, #{projectDeptName}, #{serviceContactName,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, #{serviceContactPhone,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, #{serviceBasis}, #{serviceStartDate}, #{serviceEndDate}, #{status}, #{submittedByAccountId}, #{submittedByUserId}, #{submittedAt}, #{verifiedByAccountId}, #{verifiedByUserId}, #{verifiedAt}, #{rejectionReason}, #{version}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_property_service_organization SET enterprise_id = #{row.enterpriseId}, project_dept_id = #{row.projectDeptId}, project_dept_name = #{row.projectDeptName}, service_contact_name = #{row.serviceContactName,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, service_contact_phone = #{row.serviceContactPhone,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, service_basis = #{row.serviceBasis}, service_start_date = #{row.serviceStartDate}, service_end_date = #{row.serviceEndDate}, status = #{row.status}, submitted_by_account_id = #{row.submittedByAccountId}, submitted_by_user_id = #{row.submittedByUserId}, submitted_at = #{row.submittedAt}, verified_by_account_id = #{row.verifiedByAccountId}, verified_by_user_id = #{row.verifiedByUserId}, verified_at = #{row.verifiedAt}, rejection_reason = #{row.rejectionReason}, version = version + 1, update_time = #{row.updateTime} WHERE organization_id = #{row.organizationId} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT enterprise_id, enterprise_dept_id, legal_name, unified_social_credit_code, create_time, update_time FROM t_property_service_enterprise WHERE unified_social_credit_code = #{unifiedSocialCreditCode} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE t_property_service_enterprise SET enterprise_dept_id = #{enterpriseDeptId}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND enterprise_dept_id IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT material_id, organization_id, material_type, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, sha256, uploaded_by_account_id, status, create_time FROM t_property_service_organization_material WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY create_time ASC, material_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_property_service_organization_verification ( organization_id, legal_name_snapshot, unified_social_credit_code_snapshot, verification_method, provider_code, source_code, provider_request_id, provider_result_code, verification_result, business_status, result_message, inconsistent_fields_json, evidence_reference, remark, operator_account_id, operator_user_id, operator_role_key, simulated, verified_at ) VALUES ( #{organizationId}, #{legalNameSnapshot}, #{unifiedSocialCreditCodeSnapshot}, #{verificationMethod}, #{providerCode}, #{sourceCode}, #{providerRequestId}, #{providerResultCode}, #{verificationResult}, #{businessStatus}, #{resultMessage}, CAST(#{inconsistentFieldsJson} AS JSONB), #{evidenceReference}, #{remark}, #{operatorAccountId}, #{operatorUserId}, #{operatorRoleKey}, CASE WHEN #{simulated} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, #{verifiedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT verification_id, organization_id, legal_name_snapshot, unified_social_credit_code_snapshot, verification_method, provider_code, source_code, provider_request_id, provider_result_code, verification_result, business_status, result_message, inconsistent_fields_json::TEXT AS inconsistent_fields_json, evidence_reference, remark, operator_account_id, operator_user_id, operator_role_key, (simulated = 1) AS simulated, verified_at FROM t_property_service_organization_verification WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId} ORDER BY verified_at DESC, verification_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_property_service_organization_audit ( organization_id, actor_account_id, actor_user_id, actor_dept_id, event_type, from_status, to_status, payload_json ) VALUES ( #{organizationId}, #{actorAccountId}, #{actorUserId}, #{actorDeptId}, #{eventType}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSONB) )
